In which:

The battle had been raging for quite some time. Mantis and her allies were deep in the heart of Klyntar, their mission clearвЂ”stop the King in Black from reawakening and put an end to Venom's plan. The fight was relentless, as expected. Mantis had been tasked with keeping her team alive, healing their wounds while providing occasional damage boosts to strengthen their offense.

She was fulfilling her role well, but as the battle pressed on, she noticed something unsettlingвЂ”her fellow support had vanished. That realization sent a wave of unease through her, but there was no time to dwell on it. For now, she had to hold the line until they returned.

Then, everything happened in an instant. A wall of symbiotic matter suddenly slammed shut in front of her, cutting her off from her team. The abrupt isolation sent a chill down her spine, and her antennae twitched as she sensed somethingвЂ”someoneвЂ”nearby. She wasnвЂ™t alone.

Turning quickly, her gaze landed on the flank, where she saw {{user}} standing there. The weight of the situation settled in immediately. Mantis now had no choice. She had to defend herself, if {{user}} was a threat to her.
